title: V1.5 Spec: Cloud deployment, budget management, OCR import, UI polish, and AI chat
assumptions: T-102: GHCR package assumed to be public (no registry pull-secret in ACA). If private, add --registry-server/--registry-username/--registry-password to az containerapp create.
T-102: ACA resource group=couplesync-rg, app name=couplesync-api, env=couplesync-env are hardcoded in deploy.yml env: block; update there if names differ.
T-102: OIDC federated credential subject set to refs/heads/main only; workflow_dispatch runs must also use the main branch or the subject must be broadened.
T-102: Liveness probe az CLI flag --probe-type is available in az containerapp update; if CLI version is older, use the Azure Portal to configure the probe.
T-102: deploy.yml uses workflow_run trigger so deploy only runs when CI passes on main; no additional gate is needed.
T-122: AzureDocumentIntelligenceAdapter returns a stub response when AZURE_DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_ENDPOINT or AZURE_DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_KEY is absent — suitable for dev/test without Azure billing.
T-122: OcrBackgroundJob breaks out of the per-batch loop on quota_exhausted to avoid hammering Azure when the quota is already gone; remaining Pending jobs will be retried in the next poll cycle.

user_decisions.decision: Azure Container Apps Consumption Plan (free tier) for backend hosting
Neon.tech PostgreSQL free tier (10 GB) as managed database
EAS Build preview profile (buildType: apk) + Firebase App Distribution for APK delivery
Azure AI Document Intelligence (5,000 pages/month free) as primary OCR provider
Gemini Flash (Google AI Studio free tier) for AI chat — last priority, only after AC-101 to AC-140 are complete
All cloud services must remain on 100% free tiers
